data.content: I always prefer to visit counter number 8 at the Relaam Real Estate office in Dalma Mall. Ms. Dhanielyn Santos is always there waiting with a pleasant smile. She is incredibly friendly, efficient, and has thorough knowledge of her work. She finishes documentation so quickly, which completely saved me from taking multiple days off work for my lease renewal. She’s absolutely awesome and I wish her all the best!
I am very happy to get support from relaam representative Mr mahmoud Elrawy. Thank you very much your coordination and great support.

ادارة سيئة وتواصل اسوء الي اسبوع بحاول اوصل ل شقة عن طريقهم و ما قدرت بسبب بطئ خدمتهم
و شكلي راح روح للبروكرز

I would like to say thanks for all people here specifically  Mr. Ashfaq from rent department,he is very cooperative and helps with all people.i wishing for him
very best and continued success. Keep up the great work! and other staff good
اسواء مركز إدارة عقارات وخدماتهم جدا سيئة ولا في اهتمام بالعميل أو مشاكل العميل فقط يهمهم الفلوس ومن ٦ اشهر والمكيف خربان وكل ما اتواصل معاهم يقولون المالك رفض يبدل المكيف طيب انا شو ذنبي كمستأجر

One of the worst company ever i met
No maintenance service and unprofessional behaviour
J am wondering why abu dhabi government is not taking any action against these money looting team
Our building ac has not working since one month all tenants are suffering, we had communicated multiple time and email send but no response
The worst team and worst service
Shame of you relaam
Excellent customer service

I was been customer for ADCP properties for 4 years. Overall experience is good. But while I am exiting and handovering the keys back to properties (on 23.04.2026), had a very very WORST experience with one of staff member named Ms. HANA.

Her behaviour is worst and could not handle the customer in proper manner.
She is very very arrogant.

The issue was, I went to handover the keys back to Relaam on 23.04.2026. She denied to receive the keys from me stating that 'flat Maintenence clearance letter' is not received (i double confirmed with Customer care that i received the clearance letter), she arrogantly informed me that I can submit the keys to Relaam only during my contract termination date (11.05.2026).
I told her politely that I am travelling next week, hence I need to deposit the keys to properties TODAY only. She replied me that, THAT IS YOUR PROBLEM, NOT MY PROBLEM. I didn't expect this behaviour and no one spoken to me in that manner in my entire UAE career. I wholeheartedly hurted and informed to her Supervisor. He came and spoke with her, still she is speaking with him also in the same manner.

Due to her (Ms. Hana) worst behaviour, I visited next day, to the Relaam office and completed my job with other team member.

I recommend not to visit her in any manner. She doesn't know the basic manner, how to speak/handle with customers.

Due to this issue, I am giving less rating.
The service was entirely disorganized and lacked any coherent system or process. Deeply unsatisfactory and highly disappointing.

Very worst real estate.. no proper support from them. The only thing is on time is our cheque deposit and payments. Other than all very poor service. -You have to wait 2 hours to meet the customer rep.

I would love to share some great feedback about Anisa Salad at Danat Mall.
I visited the branch with quite a few inquiries and questions, and Anisa handled everything with outstanding patience, professionalism, and attention to detail. She took the time to explain every step clearly, provided all the guidance and advice I needed, and made the entire experience smooth and comfortable.
Thank you, Anisa. It’s always a pleasure to see someone represent their organization with such care, professionalism, and positive energy.
Deem in counter was really helpful.. Highly recommended. Hana ibrahim in counter 22 is professional.

Poor Maintenaces of building using their new maintenance contractor (IFM). They don't have proper people and no proper response. It is waste of money to book the building with Relaam
This will be my last year with such useless property management team who doesn't care about the people and only concentration on money alone
Poor response.. bad customer service.. if you had an issue, you probably had to wait months to be solved. not recommended!

Hi Relaam Team,

Please look into the bldg issues of P/614.
1. AC issue
2. Car lift issue

This problem has been there more than a month now.
Hopefully, you can send an efficient maintenance team.
Ms. Dhanielyn was very helpful in renewing my contract. Even she helped in arranging all approval for reducing the rent for my apartment.
They ignore all our requests and trying to arrange a meeting to solve the problem. I hope higher administrative levels will help us.

عندما تم ادارة العقارات من قبل شركة ريلام أصبحت الخدمات والتعامل سيء جدا من حيث خدمة العملاء والتواصل لا يتم عند طلب خدمة عن طريق الهاتف او التطبيق هذا وتم التلاعب في قانون المستأجرين المطبق في ابوظبي والذي ينص على رفع الايجار بنسبة ٥% حيث قامة الشركة بالالتفاف على القانون من خلال اخطار المستأجرين عن طريق المحكمة بانذار اخلاء لعدم الرغبة في تجديد العقد وعند مراجعتهم في مقر الشركة اخبرونا انه أما ان اقبل برفع الايجار بنسبة ١٣ الف درهم وهذا يعادل ٢٠% تقريبا مستغلين ثغرة اخلاء المستأجر لعدم رغبة المالك بالتجديد تون أي سبب يذكر وهذا من اجل رفع الايجار وهذه طرق ملتويه لاجبار المستأجرين على رفع الايجار ،كيف ينام هؤلاء الناس وهم يفعلون هذا بالمستأجرين. نرجو تدخل المسؤولين عن تنظيم العقارات ومحاسبة من يستغل الفرص لرفع الغير مبرر على المستأجرين.لا أنصح احد بالتعامل ولي جربهمةيعرف هل كلام
Dhanielyn Santos ..Very fast and convinent

Ac not working from 3 weeks and no one ks bothered to help out. .. we call and they say will inform supervisor.. same thing everyday which is getting frustrated... my child is not well coz of the heat and we feel unhealthy too coz of no ac ... I plead for help ... I dont mind paying the maintainence to fix the ac but they need to come and speak to what is happening

I would like to express my sincere thanks to Ms. Dhanielysn Santos, Ms. Shohra, Mr. Shuhaib, Mr. Abdul Rahim and the entire Relaam team.
I truly appreciate all the effort, dedication, and support you provided in confirming my tenancy contract. Your professionalism, prompt assistance, and commitment throughout the process made everything much smoother.
Thank you once again for your hard work and excellent service. It has been a pleasure working with such a supportive and efficient team.

I am disappointed with the office’s queueing system. The waiting system does not adhere to a numerical order; instead, it prioritizes personal preferences. And when I reach the counter the person attending is missing from her desk for an hour
Very bad not  recommend
سيء جدا لاينصح بالتعامل معهم من تجربة شخصية

This is a new facility that was relocated from the city and is now located below Centrepoint in Marina Mall. I arrived at 9:15 AM on a weekday and found that many people were already waiting with tokens. However, I was able to reach the payment-related counter within 15 minutes.
Mr.  Ashfaq Khan and Mr. Mahmoud Elrawy the staff of Relaam Real estate helped to take new contract with your company. I very much appreciate their service. I greatful and sincerely thank them .

تجربة مميزة خدمة احترافية
التعامل مع السيد / حسام كان في غاية الزوق و اللباقة
I NEED CONTACT DETAILS. I NEED 1BH RENT LONG TERM IN MADINAT ZAYED. PLEASE SHARE CONTACT DETAILS. MENTIOED NUMBER NOT REACHED
Thank you Mr. Husam for great support
Husam al bitar is a very positive person and best attitude to communicate with people's. Best wish for him

I had an excellent experience with Husam Al Bitar, the Leasing Manager for Al Dhafra region (Madinat Zayed). He was extremely helpful, pleasant, and patient throughout the entire process. He guided me clearly, answered all my doubts, and went above and beyond to assist me with my rental contract and TAQA connection, even though I came all the way from Al Ain.

What really impressed me was how professionally he handled another customer’s maintenance complaint right in front of us — calmly and with respect, even though it wasn’t his responsibility. His professionalism, courtesy, and dedication truly stand out.

Highly recommended — wishing him all the best in his career!
Excellent person to deal with. Extremely helpful Mr. Husam Al Bitar.
Nice support and he doing good job thank you  Mr Husam Al bitar
Good service & good respected person & take more responsibility Mr.Husam Al Bitar. I have toomuch happy in his service. Masha Allah,God bless to him

Worst experience ever. I couldn’t have imagined such a careless approach to maintenance and customer service. The delay in the flat's readiness for handover was unacceptable, and what's worse — there was absolutely no sense of urgency or responsibility from their side. Extremely disappointed.
Mr Husam Al Baitar was very helpful, patient with me, answered all my questions, explained the application process clearly, and made sure I understood everything required. Thank you to him

كل الشكر والتقدير والإحترام للأستاذ حسام البيتار علي أخلاقه العاليه وحسن تعاونه ... إنه شخص أكثر من رائع وعلي قدر عالي من الإحترافية والرقي في التعامل وأشكر إدارة ريلام علي حسن إختيار من يمثلها وأتمني له دوام التوفيق والنجاح

Hospatlity of "Husam al bitar" during my visit to ADCP office was amazing.
He explained very briefly about terms and condition.

Not recommended very bad experience with leasing department waste of time
Disappointed with service

انا مستاجر في بناية بتك لبوظبي التجاري في راس الخيمة اكتر من شهر في البناية باكملها مكيفات خربانة نحن الاسره ساكنيين و عايشين ع المرواح و نتصل كل يوم فيهم مافي حد يحل المشكله اذا ما حلت المشكله لازم نرجع لجهة المختصه المحكمه لأسترجع الشيكات و اعتبر العقد ملغي حسب القرار

Hello brothers
Please dont go any one to this realeatate.. dont take properties of them….totally worst services especially their sharjah branch (crystal plaza building) not considering customers not behaving properly , making customers waiting without anyreason… totally very cheap behavior …. They are drinking tea talking to others even lot of customers waiting them… giving zero star out of 100
Please  brothers dont take their properties…
Nice personality

Had a great experience with mr. Shahab mohammed.
Thank you.
Very good experience for services especially Mr.Shahab Mohammed
Shahab Mohammed is a very good   Exalent work... I am  santicfaide in office...

I am extremely frustrated with the way my AC maintenance request Ref# 3770604 has been handled. The complaint has been pending for over one month, and despite calling your customer care center repeatedly, I keep receiving the same empty response: “the case is escalated, and you will receive an update within two working days.” This has been repeated to me more than six times, yet absolutely nothing has been done.

Mr. Shahab Mohammed assist me to renew my contract and I am very satisfied with his service

Thank you

Shahab Mohammed
Amazing staff and we renewing with him since ten years , hard worker from heart
Shihab mohammed
شهاب الدين محمدموظف ممتاز
Shihab Mohammed
I was served by Mr. Salim Basawitain, whose great manners and professionalism were truly outstanding.

The worst company i have ever work with.

We had lease in Al roda tower and still struggling to get our deposit back from the company its been 3 month now.

Shahab only responding to the email after so many follow ups and still no proper information about deposit.

عنجد معامله كتير سيئة الواحد يقضي اليوم كامل عشان يخلص معاملتو وطلع قرار بخصوص عدم رفع الاجار
وكانو عاملين حكم محكمه عشان الاخلاء عشان يزيدو الاجار 30بالميه بتكلفهن 700درهم شالوها مني بعد م طلع القرار بعدم رفع الاجار شركه سيئه جدااااا

Id rather live on the streets than renting from relaam  customer service supportive , but maintaince is worst ,my whole apartment HVAC is not working , called maintenance  made service request , the maintenance team are very rude , he switch off his phone when i request them to come , its been a week and we are in middle of summer No AC and iam currently using portable AC to cool my room , the whole building plus all apartment has no hvac air conditioning working , dont rent from adcp worst company!!!!

Nuha Al Hamaydeh consistently demonstrates exceptional professionalism and dedication. For many years, I always found her extremely helpful. She is an invaluable asset to the Relaam team, blending high-level problem-solving skills with a genuinely warm, customer-centric approach. It is a privilege to have someone of Nuha’s character!
خدمه سيئة من جميع النواحي وعدم حل مشكلة المستأجر ويماطلون ويتاخرون في كل شي ومحد يخلص لك شي الا بعد ماتتصل فيهم 20 مره يومياً

Perfect customer service..
Specially by Amal Alburaidaei.
I didn’t face any issues or difficulties,, just few minutes the contract was signed.
Thanks Amal..  thanks all
ممتاز
لا انصح بالتعامل معهم اسلوبهم مستفز وشققهم تعبانه وصيانتهم متعبه بشكل غير عادي.

اسوء تجربة بحياتي بالايجارات - كنت بدي اطلع من البيت وطلبوا شهرين اجار ورسوم 1050 كمان لحتى اطلع او لاقي مستاجر ومع اني لقيت المستاجر بس طلبوا كمان رسوم تحويل 2100 وعمولة مع انو انا يلي لقيت المستاجر ورسوم شيك ورسوم عقد جديد وتامين 3000 / وصلولي الرسوم بس من غير دفعة البيت حوالي 8500 درهم

أود أن أتقدم بجزيل الشكر للأستاذة نهى والأستاذة أحلام على جهودهما الاستثنائية. لقد تم التعامل مع طلباتي العقارية بكل احترافية ودقة، وكان تواصلهما راقياً وسريعاً. أنصح بشدة بالتعامل معهما لمن يبحث عن التميز والمصداقية. شكراً جزيلاً لكم
Want to thanks Ms.Amal Alburaidaei, Shadi and Rabai
خدمه سيئه منحكي معاكم عن النظافه المصعد صرلو اكتر من شهر لايعمل ماحدا برد رح نشكي عليكم كل الجيران اسؤا شركه وتعامل

أود شكر الأخت شمّة علي لمساعدتي في حل مشكلة تجديد العقد، حيث تعاملت معي بأسلوب رائع و محترم، حيث أنها إتصلت بي وأخبرتني شخصيا بان المشكلة قد تم حلُّها وقد ساعدتي بتقديم طلب التجديد لديها. أشرك الادارة لتواجد موظفين يستقبلونا بابتسامة واحترام.
كل شكر والاحترام للموظف سالم يعكس صوره رائعه
مصعد اكثر من شهرين معطل وكل ما بنتصل بيدرو حيرفعو الأمر للإدارة للأسف كانت احسن شركة وكانت الصيانة سريعة جدا لكن بعد التغير صارت سئية جدا
